nasb.text: Then Hiram king of Tyre sent messengers to David with cedar trees and carpenters and stonemasons; and they built a house for David.

esv.text: And Hiram king of Tyre sent messengers to David, and cedar trees, also carpenters and masons who built David a house.

cnv.text: 推羅王希蘭差派使者來見大衛，又送來香柏木、木匠和石匠，他們就給大衛建造宮殿。

ccb.text: 泰尔王希兰差遣使者带着香柏木、木匠和石匠去为大卫建造宫殿。
